plugins.name: cairn
plugins.description: Cairn — marks the trail and remembers the path. Batteries-included: installing it pulls in GSD (a plugin dependency) and bootstraps the beads issue tracker (bd), then a single /cairn:init wires a project end to end. Wires the GSD planning workflow (/gsd:*) to beads (bd) so phases create/claim/close tracked work, optionally mirrors bd issues two-way (hub-and-spoke) to GitHub Issues, GitLab, Jira, Asana, and Azure Boards, and optionally makes the context-mode knowledge base intent-aware (scopes compressed memory to the active issue + phase). The integration conventions activate only in repos that use both GSD and beads.

plugins.name: gsd
plugins.description: Get Shit Done — a structured planning/execution/verification workflow for Claude Code (/gsd:*), MCP-backed project state. Re-published here as a dependency of cairn so it installs automatically; upstream is jnuyens/gsd-plugin (tracking open-gsd/get-shit-done-redux). Installable on its own too.

plugins.name: context-mode
plugins.description: Context-mode — MCP plugin that saves ~98% of your context window: sandboxed code execution and an FTS5/BM25 knowledge base with intent-driven search. Re-published here as a dependency of cairn so it installs automatically; upstream is mksglu/context-mode. Installable on its own too.
